snapshot.title: Proof of Life — Daily safety check-ins for the people you love

badgeLinks.text: Get Proof of Life — it's free

snapshot.bodyTextSample: Proof of LifeFeaturesHow it worksPricingFAQLog inGet the appLoved by 240,000+ people in 84 countriesOne tap a day.Peace of mind for everyone who loves you.Proof of Life is a calm daily ritual. Check in once — your circle sees you're safe. Miss a check-in, and the people who matter most are alerted automatically.Start your first check-in See how it worksFree forever for up to 3 contacts. No credit card.I'm safeHold to check inAs featured inTechCrunchWiredThe VergeProduct Hunt #1Fast CompanyBuilt for the quiet moments that matter most.Not another tracker. A gentle thread between you and the people you love.A ritual, not a choreA 2-second daily tap that becomes the most reassuring habit you've ever built.Silent alertsMiss a check-in and your trusted circle is notified. No drama. No false alarms.Your circle, your rulesRoommates, parents, partners, hiking friends — choose who knows what, and when.Private by designEnd-to-end encrypted location pings. Shared only when you miss a check-in.Instant SOSOne long-press triggers an emergency alert with live location to everyone in your circle.Works anywhereFrom your daily commute to a solo hike in Patagonia — works on any network, any device.How it worksCalmer than a text. Smarter than a tracker.01Build your circleInvite the 3–10 people who'd want to know you got home safe.02Pick your ritualOnce a day, twice a day, or after late shifts. You set the rhythm.03Tap. Breathe. Done.A two-second hold. Your circle sees a soft green heart appear next to your name.04If you go silent…We wait, we nudge, we follow up. Then your circle is alerted with your last known location.A pocket-sized promise.Designed for one-thumb use. Optimized for the 4 a.m. moments. Built so your grandmother can use it as easily as your teenager.Native-feeling iOS & Android experienceWorks offline — syncs the moment you reconnectC
